# release

import "github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/internal/commands/release"

<a name="NotesText"></a>
## type [NotesText](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/commands/release/notes.go#L14-L23>)

NotesText carries localized release\-note strings used by rendering helpers.

```go
type NotesText struct {
    NoIssues              string
    HeadingCategoryFormat string
    IssueBulletFormat     string
    CategoryBugFixes      string
    CategoryFeatures      string
    CategoryTasks         string
    CategorySubtasks      string
    CategoryEpics         string
}
```

<a name="WorkflowDeps"></a>
## type [WorkflowDeps](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/commands/release/workflow.go#L29-L36>)

WorkflowDeps defines external dependencies required to execute release workflow.

```go
type WorkflowDeps struct {
    NewGitClient           func(*viper.Viper, *chan string) (git.Git, error)
    NewJiraClient          func(*viper.Viper) (jira.Jira, error)
    NewGitHubClient        func(git.Git, *viper.Viper) (github.Github, error)
    FetchIssueDetails      func(jira.Jira, []string) ([]*tracker.Issue, error)
    BuildReleaseNotes      func(string, []*tracker.Issue, *tracker.Release, jira.Jira) string
    DefaultTargetCommitish func() string
}
```

<a name="WorkflowEmitter"></a>
## type [WorkflowEmitter](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/commands/release/workflow.go#L23-L26>)

WorkflowEmitter defines logging operations used by the release workflow.

```go
type WorkflowEmitter interface {
    Info(emoji string, key i18n.Key, args ...any)
    Verbose(key i18n.Key, args ...any)
}
```

<a name="WorkflowFlags"></a>
## type [WorkflowFlags](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/commands/release/workflow.go#L16-L20>)

WorkflowFlags carries release command options required by the workflow.

```go
type WorkflowFlags struct {
    Issues       []string
    Simple       bool
    NoVCSRelease bool
}
```

<a name="WorkflowRunner"></a>
## type [WorkflowRunner](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/commands/release/workflow.go#L39-L44>)

WorkflowRunner executes release creation using injected configuration and dependencies.

```go
type WorkflowRunner struct {
    Config   *viper.Viper
    Localize func(i18n.Key, ...any) string
    Flags    WorkflowFlags
    Deps     WorkflowDeps
}
```

<a name="WorkflowRunner.Run"></a>

```go
func (r WorkflowRunner) Run(statusCh *chan string, out WorkflowEmitter, releaseName string) error
```

Run executes the release workflow end\-to\-end.
